title: UserProfileResponse
description: UserProfileResponse schema from Amplitude User Profile API

user_properties.description: A dictionary of the user's properties as set via the Identify API or SDK.

computed_properties.description: A dictionary of computed properties calculated by Amplitude for the user.

cohort_ids.description: Array of cohort IDs the user is a member of.

recommendations.description: Array of personalized recommendation results for the user. Only included when get_recs is true.

amplitude_id.description: The Amplitude internal ID for the user.
